entities.name: IOCTL_USBPRINT_GET_LPT_STATUS
entities.description: IOCTL_USBPRINT_GET_LPT_STATUS control code retrieves the LPT port status for USB printing devices.

entities.name: IOCTL_USBPRINT_VENDOR_GET_COMMAND
entities.entity_type: USB打印供应商获取命令的IOCTL控制码。Usbprint.sys不提供从设备获取描述符或直接操作USB管道的机制。
entities.description: USB打印供应商获取命令的IOCTL控制码。Usbprint.sys不提供从设备获取描述符或直接操作USB管道的机制。

entities.name: BIDI_TYPE
entities.description: Specifies bidirectional communication data types used in printer configuration. Commonly used with BIDI_TEXT and BIDI_INT types.

entities.name: DATA_HEADER
entities.description: Font Data Unidrv字体格式文件的组成部分，与UFF_FONTDIRECTORY结构配对出现。每个DATA_HEADER结构都与一个字体数据块相关联。UFF_FILEHEADER结构包含从文件开头到第一个UFF_FONTDIRECTORY结构的偏移量。

entities.name: TVOT_LISTBOX
entities.description: TVOT_LISTBOX 选项类型由组框中的列表框组成。OPTITEM 结构 Sel/pSel 指向该选项的 OPTTYPE 结构的 pOptParam 成员的 OPTPARAM 数组的索引，指定当前选定的选项参数。OPTPARAM 结构数组（OPTTYPE 的 pOptParam 成员）pData 指向要在列表框中显示的文本字符串，IconID 标识要与文本字符串关联的图标。

entities.name: TVOT_2STATES
entities.description: TVOT_2STATES option type consists of two radio buttons within a group box. The OPTITEM structure's Sel/pSel points to the index of the OPTPARAM array in the OPTTYPE structure's pOptParam member, specifying the currently selected option parameter.

entities.name: TVOT_COMBOBOX
entities.description: TVOT_COMBOBOX 选项类型由组框内的组合框组成。OPTITEM 结构 Sel/pSel 指向该选项的 OPTTYPE 结构的 pOptParam 成员的 OPTPARAM 数组的索引。这指定当前选定的选项参数。OPTPARAM 结构数组（OPTTYPE 的 pOptParam 成员）pData pOptParam[0]->pData 指向要在组合框中显示的第一个文本字符串。pOptParam[1]->pData 指向要在组合框中显示的第二个文本字符串。pOptParam[n]->pData 指向要在组合框中显示的第 n 个文本字符串。IconID pOptParam[0]->IconID 标识要与第一个文本字符串关联的图标。pOptParam[1]->IconID 标识要与第二个文本字符串关联的图标。pOptParam[n]->IconID 标识要与第 n 个文本字符串关联的图标。lParam 未使用。

entities.name: CPSFUNC_INSERT_PSUIPAGE
entities.description: 函数代码调用 CPSUI 的 ComPropSheet 函数，并指定 PSUIPAGEINSERT_GROUP_PARENT 作为 INSERTPSUIPAGE_INFO 结构的 Type 成员，从而创建组父实体。创建新组父实体时，将返回一个句柄。然后，在添加或删除属性表时，可以将该句柄用作 ComPropSheet 的 hComPropSheet 参数。此外，组父实体句柄将作为 PROPSHEETUI_INFO 结构的 hComPropSheet 成员接收，该结构由应用程序的 PFNPROPSHEETUI 类型回调函数接收。如果不创建新的组父实体，则所有属性表都应分配给这个组父实体。可以在创建的每个组父实体下创建其他组父实体。属性表本身被视为顶层组父实体。如果没有明确创建其他组父实体，所有添加的属性表都会分配给顶层父实体。

entities.name: DrvPopulateFilterServices
entities.description: Populates filter services for print pipeline. Takes IPrintPipelinePropertyBag pointer as input parameter.

entities.name: VariantInit
entities.description: Initializes a VARIANT structure.

entities.name: DrvPrinterEvent
entities.description: Handles printer events. Parameters: pPrinterName (LPWSTR) - printer name, Event (INT) - event type, Flags (DWORD) - event flags, lParam (LPARAM) - additional parameter

entities.name: DOCUMENTEVENT_UNSUPPORTED
entities.description: 驱动程序不支持 iEsc 识别的转义码。

entities.name: BindPrinter
entities.description: Binds a printer handle to printer options and device mode flags. The function retrieves printer namespaces and is part of the modern printing platform in Windows. Note: Microsoft recommends using the IPP inbox class driver and Print Support Apps (PSA) for printer device development in Windows 10 and 11.

entities.name: CreatePrintAsyncNotifyChannel
entities.description: Creates an asynchronous notification channel for print components. The channel can be per-printer or per-server. Print components can only open notification channels when the spooler loads the component. If the caller runs inside an application rather than the spooler service, Winspool.drv disables this functionality. Requires specifying: 1) Printer/server name, 2) Notification channel type, 3) User filter (sender's user or all users), 4) Conversation style (unidirectional or bidirectional).

entities.name: DrvDocumentEvent
entities.description:
Print driver callback function for handling document events. Parameters:
- hPrinter: Printer handle provided by WPF print support
- hdc: Device context handle from CreateDC call (zero if iEsc is DOCUMENTEVENT_CREATEDCPRE)
- iEsc: Escape code identifying the event to process
- cbIn: Size of input data
- pvIn: Pointer to input data
- cbOut: Size of output data
- pvOut: Pointer to output data

The function must handle both XPS and GDI documents using the same event values, determining job type based on hdc parameter.

entities.name: DrvUpgradePrinter
entities.description: Upgrades a printer driver to a newer version.
entities.syntax: DWORD DrvUpgradePrinter(DWORD Level, LPBYTE pDriverUpgradeInfo, HANDLE hPrinter);

entities.name: DC_ORIENTATION
entities.description: DC_COLLATE 非 XPSDrv 行为

entities.name: DCTT_DOWNLOAD_OUTLINE
entities.description: Flag constant for DeviceCapabilities function. Indicates support for outline font downloading when the printer supports 'Automatic', 'DownloadAsRasterFont' or 'DownloadAsNativeTrueTypeFont' print schema keywords.

entities.name: InitializePrintProvidor
entities.description: Initializes a print provider. This function is required for print queue management functionality.

entities.name: ConfigurePort
entities.description: Printer driver port configuration function

entities.name: OpenPortEx
entities.description: Opens a printer port for printing operations. After calling OpenPortEx (or OpenPort), the spooler will not attempt to open the same port again until it is closed. Once the port is opened, the spooler can call other functions to print jobs, using the port handle as an input parameter. Monitors should be written to allow multiple print jobs to be sent before closing the port. The port is closed when jobs must be sent through other language monitors, when no print queue is associated with the port, or during system shutdown via the ClosePort function.

entities.name: COPYFILE_EVENT_ADD_PRINTER_CONNECTION
entities.description: Event constant indicating the addition of a printer connection. Used in printer driver operations.

entities.name: XPSDrvRendering
entities.description: XPSDrv渲染架构中的IHV筛选器接口。描述了从XPS到设备PDL输出的呈现过程，包括建议的输入类型(IXpsDocumentProvider)和输出类型(IPrintWriteStream)，以及命名约定等开发指南。

entities.name: writePrintData
entities.description: JavaScript function used in USB Bidi extender for communicating with printing devices. Allows modifying print streams or implementing host-based request/response protocols.

parameters.name: IPrinterScriptableSequentialStream
parameters.description: 对象，允许对 USB 总线进行读写访问。 schemaRequests

parameters.name: 包含所有请求的
parameters.description: Bidi 查询字符串的数组对象。 printerBidiSchemaResponses[out] 脚本用于存储对查询键的所有响应的对象。 （setSchema 方法） scriptContext [in] IPrinterScriptContext 对象，提供对相关属性包的访问。 printerStream

parameters.name: IPrinterScriptableSequentialStream
parameters.description: 对象，允许对 USB 总线进行读写访问。 printerBidiSchemaElement

parameters.name: IPrinterBidiSchemaElement
parameters.description: 对象，其中包含与要设置的 Bidi 架构值关联的所有数据。 （startPrintJob 方法） jobScriptContext [in] IPrinterScriptUsbJobContext 对象，使制造商的 JavaScript 代码能够访问作业属性包和持久数据流。 printerStream

parameters.name: IPrinterScriptableSequentialStream
parameters.description: 对象，制造商的 JavaScript 代码可以使用它来读取和写入打印设备的数据。 printerBidiSchemaResponses

parameters.name: IPrinterBidiSchemaResponses
parameters.description: 对象，制造商的 JavaScript 代码可以使用该对象返回任何 Bidi 架构值更改/更新。 （writePrintData 方法） jobScriptContext [in] IPrinterScriptUsbJobContext 对象，使制造商的 JavaScript 代码能够访问作业属性包和持久数据流。 writePrintDataProgress

parameters.name: IPrinterScriptableSequentialStream
parameters.description: 对象，制造商的 JavaScript 代码可以使用它来读取和写入打印设备的数据。 printData

parameters.name: IDispatch
parameters.description: 对象，即当前打印数据的 JavaScript 数组。 printData 参数允许 JavaScript 代码在将数据缓存到 jobScriptContext 中的某个数据流或通过 printerStream 将其发送到打印机之前对其进行操作。 printerStream

parameters.name: IPrinterScriptableSequentialStream
parameters.description: 对象，制造商的 JavaScript 代码可以使用它来读取和写入打印设备的数据。 printerBidiSchemaResponses

parameters.name: IPrinterBidiSchemaResponses
parameters.description: 对象，制造商的 JavaScript 代码可以使用该对象返回任何 Bidi 架构值更改或更新。 （endPrintJob 方法） jobScriptContext [in] IPrinterScriptUsbJobContext 对象，使制造商的 JavaScript 代码能够访问作业属性包和持久数据流。 printerStream

parameters.name: IPrinterScriptableSequentialStream
parameters.description: 对象，制造商的 JavaScript 代码可以使用它来读取和写入打印设备的数据。 printerBidiSchemaResponses

parameters.name: IPrinterBidiSchemaResponses
parameters.description: 对象，制造商的 JavaScript 代码可以使用该对象返回任何 Bidi 架构值更改或更新。

return_value.description: （getSchemas 方法） 0 1 说明 脚本已成功完成。 连接的设备未准备好提供某些请求的信息。 指示打印系统应使用在处理过程中添加的任何 Requery 键再次调用函数。 setSchema 方法 此方法处理 Bidi SET 操作。 该脚本可以确定传入的 Bidi 架构值，以在设备中设置数据，或在设备上执行一些操作，例如清洁墨头。 如果设备尚未准备好处理指定的数据，则该方法可以返回值 1，表示在等待一段时间后应重试调用。 （setSchema 方法） 0 1 说明 脚本已成功完成。 连接的设备未准备好提供某些请求的信息。 指示打印系统应使用提供的 printerBidiSchemaElement 再次调用该函数。 getStatus 方法 此方法用于在设备打印时从打印机获取未经请求的状态。 此函数仅在打印过程中调用。设备应在读取通道上提供数据，此脚本可以将其解释为 Bidi 架构值。 由于打印数据阻止了设备的写入通道，因此此处仅支持未经请求的状态。 在打印过程中重复调用此方法。 预计该设备只有在数据可用且脚本可以理解的情况下才会返回数据。 如果设备不支持未经请求的状态，或者不需要再次调用此函数，则脚本返 回值 2，该值指示 USBMon 中的 getStatus 执行线程成功退出。参数（getStatus 方法） scriptContext [in] IPrinterScriptContext 对象，提供对相关属性包的访问。 printerStream [in] IPrinterScriptableSequentialStream 对象，允许对 USB 总线进行读取访问。 printerBidiSchemaResponses [out] 脚本用于存储对查询键的所有响应的对象。返回值（getStatus 方法） 0 2 说明 脚本已成功完成。 连接的设备不再支持未经请求的状态，不应再次调用此函数。 startPrintJob 方法 USBMon 在 StartDocPort 期间调用此方法。 调用 startPrintJob 允许驱动程序修改打印流或实现打印设备打印作业时使用的基于主机的请求/响应协议。 作业上下文对象被传递到函数中，以允许制造商的 JavaScript 代码管理作业属性，并获取对持久数据流的访问权限。 打印数据以 JavaScript 数组的形式传入，供 JavaScript 代码处理。 startPrintJob 还通过以下方式提供对打印机设备的访问： 通过打印流 通过一个可以返回 Bidi 架构响应供 USBMon 处理的对象 （startPrintJob 方法） 0 1 说明成功。 失败 – 清理作业上下文对象，并向打印后台处理程序返回错误代码。 writePrintData 方法 USBMon 在 writePort 期间调用此方法。 调用 writePrintData 允许驱动程序修改打印流或实现打印设备打印作业时使用的基于主机的请求/响应协议。 作业上下文对象被传递到方案中，以允许制造商的 JavaScript 代码管理作业属性，并获取对持久数据流的访问权限。 打印数据以 JavaScript 数组的形式传入，供 JavaScript 代码处理。 writePrintData 还通过以下方式提供对打印机设备的访问： 通过打印流 通过一个可以返回 Bidi 架构响应供 USBMon 处理的对象 JavaScript function writePrintData(jobScriptContext, writePrintDataProgress, printData, printerStream, printerBidiSchemaResponses); （writePrintData 方法） 0 1 2 3 4 说明 成功。 通过 writePrintDataProgress 返回从打印数据流 (printData) 处理的字节数。失败 – 向打印后台处理程序返回错误代码。 重试 - 在 printerBidiSchemaResponses 中处理任何 Bidi 架构更新（包括 Bidi 事件），然后再次调用 JavaScript 函数，以允许制造商的代码继续处理数据。 通过 writePrintDataProgress 返回从打印数据流 (printData) 处理的字节数。 DeviceBusy – 设备通信通道此时不接受数据。 这并不表示失败。 USBMon 通知打印后台处理程序设备正忙，然后稍后再次调用该函数。 通过 writePrintDataProgress 返回从打印数据流 (printData) 处理的字节数。 AbortTheJob – 设备无法继续处理作业，或者用户已使用打印设备的前面板取消作业。 当 USBMon 收到中止打印作业的消息时，它会在返回之前将信息传递给打印后台处理程序以中止作业。 endPrintJob 方法 USBMon 在 endDocPort 期间调用此方法。 调用 endPrintJob 允许驱动程序修改打印流或实现打印设备打印作业时使用的基于主机的请求/响应协议。 作业上下文对象被传递到 方法中，以允许制造商的 JavaScript 代码执行以下操作： 完成对所有持久打印数据的处理通过打印流访问打印机设备 访问一个可以传递 Bidi 架构响应以供 USBMon 处理的对象 JavaScript function endPrintJob(jobScriptContext, printerStream, printerBidiSchemaResponses); （endPrintJob 方法） 0 1 2 说明 成功 – 清理作业上下文对象，并将成功返回到打印后台处理程序。失败 – 清理作业上下文对象，并向打印后台处理程序返回错误代码。 重试 - 在 printerBidiSchemaResponses 中处理任何 Bidi 架构更新（包括 Bidi 事件），然后再次调用 JavaScript 函数，以允许制造商的 JavaScript 代码继续处理数据。 通过辅助 USB Bidi 如果设备支持辅助 USB 接口，则除了 requestStatus 方法外，设备还可以使用前面部分所述的 getSchemas 和 setSchema 方法。 requestStatus 方法 如果在 v4 驱动程序的清单文件中指定了 BidiUSBStatusInterface 指令，则调用此方法而不是 getStatus。 requestStatus 用于在打印设备时从打印设备获取状态。 下图提供了 USB Bidi 扩展体系结构的概述，其中显示了已指定 BidiUSBStatusInterface 指令并因此通过备用 USB 接口路由通信的方案。 USB Bidi Extender

entities.name: DOCUMENTEVENT_XPS_ADDFIXEDDOCUMENTSEQUENCEPRE
entities.description: WPF 打印支持会在将 FixedDocumentSequence 添加到 XPS 后台处理程序文件之前发送此事件。

entities.name: DOCUMENTEVENT_XPS_ADDFIXEDDOCUMENTSEQUENCEPOST
entities.description: WPF 打印支持会在将 FixedDocumentSequence 添加到 XPS 后台处理程序文件之后发送此事件。

entities.name: DOCUMENTEVENT_XPS_ADDFIXEDDOCUMENTPRE
entities.description: WPF printing support sends this event before adding a FixedDocument to the XPS spooler file.

entities.name: DOCUMENTEVENT_XPS_ADDFIXEDDOCUMENTSEQUENCEPRINTTICKETPRE
entities.description: pvIn points to a PrintPropertiesCollection structure containing four properties (see Winspool.h): EscapeCode (EPrintPropertyType::kPropertyTypeInt32/ULONG, the event value), JobIdentifier (EPrintPropertyType::kPropertyTypeInt32/ULONG), JobName (EPrintPropertyType::kPropertyTypeString/UNICODE), and PrintTicket (EPrintPropertyType::kPropertyTypeByte). The PrintPropertiesCollection structure and its properties must be allocated in the "PRE" event and released in the corresponding "POST" event. pvOut can be NULL to indicate support for the event without interest in modifying the PrintTicket. Plugins should not unload between "PRE" and "POST" events.

entities.name: DOCUMENTEVENT_XPS_ADDFIXEDDOCUMENTSEQUENCEPRINTTICKETPOST
entities.description: WPF应释放驱动程序在相应的DOCUMENTEVENT_XPS_ADDFIXEDDOCUMENTSEQUENCEPRINTTICKETPOST事件中分配的资源

entities.name: DOCUMENTEVENT_XPS_ADDFIXEDDOCUMENTPRINTTICKETPRE
entities.description: constant

entities.name: DOCUMENTEVENT_XPS_ADDFIXEDPAGEPRINTTICKETPRE
entities.description: constant

entities.name: DOCUMENTEVENT_XPS_ADDFIXEDPAGEPRINTTICKETPOST
entities.description: WPF should release driver data returned in the corresponding DOCUMENTEVENT_XPS_ADDFIXEDPAGEPRINTTICKETPRE event.

entities.name: DOCUMENTEVENT_XPS_CANCELJOB
entities.description: WPF打印支持在调用取消作业操作前发送的事件常量。用于XPS文档打印作业的取消操作。

entities.name: DOCUMENTEVENT_XPS_ADDFIXEDDOCUMENTPOST
entities.description: XPS文档打印事件，在添加固定文档后触发。与DOCUMENTEVENT_XPS_ADDFIXEDDOCUMENTPRE成对使用。pvIn参数指向PrintPropertiesCollection结构，包含EscapeCode和PageNumber属性。

entities.name: DOCUMENTEVENT_XPS_ADDFIXEDPAGEPOST
entities.description: XPS文档事件常量，与DOCUMENTEVENT_XPS_ADDFIXEDPAGEPRE配对使用

entities.name: DC_COPIES
entities.description: Specifies the maximum number of copies supported by the printer driver. Behavior varies based on driver type (Unidrv/PS) and EMF settings.

entities.name: DCTT_DOWNLOAD
entities.description: DeviceCapabilities 返回的标志之一，表示支持下载 TrueType 字体。对于 PS，DeviceCapabilities 总是返回 (DCTT_DOWNLOAD | DCTT_SUBDEV)。

entities.name: DC_STAPLE
entities.description: Specifies staple support behavior for DeviceCapabilities function. Non-XPSDrv drivers return hardcoded values indicating support for 1,2,4,6,9 or 16-up. For PostScript, checks PPD features like StapleLocation, StapleX/Y, StapleWhen, StapleOrientation.

entities.name: DM_ORIENTATION
entities.description: Specifies the orientation of the paper

entities.name: DM_TTOPTION
entities.description: Specifies TrueType options for printer settings. When dmTTOption is set to DMTT_SUBDEV, it indicates specific behaviors for XPSDrv (Unidrv only). DM_ORIENTATION flag is set in dmFields only if the GPD file supports the 'Orientation' GPD feature (Unidrv) or PPD file supports 'PageOrientation' printing schema keyword (PS only). DM_SCALE flag is set if GPD or PPD supports 'PageScaling' printing schema keyword.

entities.name: DMORIENT_PORTRAIT
entities.description: Portrait orientation constant for printer settings. (Unidrv only) Hardcoded to never set DM_SCALE flag in dmFields. (PS only) Hardcoded to always set DM_SCALE flag in dmFields.

entities.name: DM_SCALE
entities.description: 标志常量，表示缩放设置。硬编码为始终在 dmFields 中设置

entities.name: DM_PRINTQUALITY
entities.description: Print quality flag (PostScript only). Hardcoded to always set DM_PRINTQUALITY and DM_YRESOLUTION flags in dmFields.

entities.name: DM_COLLATE
entities.description: 打印标志。dmCollate 基于 GPD 或 PPD 中指定的'Collate'功能的默认选项进行设置。不应在 dmFields 中设置 DM_ICMMETHOD 或 DM_ICMINTENT 标志。

entities.name: DM_ICMINTENT
entities.description: dmFields:

entities.name: DM_DITHERTYPE
entities.description: Specifies dither type settings for printer devices. Non-XPSDrv behavior is hardcoded to always set DM_NUP flag in dmFields. Hardcoded to always set DM_COLOR flag in dmFields. (Unidrv only) Hardcoded to always set certain flags.

entities.name: PARSER_VER_1
entities.description: GPD预处理器版本定义宏，标识适用于Windows XP/2000/NT 4.0的GPD解析器版本1.0

entities.name: WINNT_40
entities.description: Symbol used to create GPD files compatible with Windows NT 4.0. Can be used with *Ifdef directives to conditionally include printer features.

entities.name: SW_RTOL
entities.description: Specifies right-to-left scanning direction for printer rendering. Part of scanning direction constants group that includes SW_LTOR (left-to-right), SW_UP (bottom-to-top), and SW_DOWN (top-to-bottom). Used in printer driver implementations.

entities.name: AT_PRINTABLE_X_ORIGIN
entities.description: Specifies the printable x-origin position

entities.name: AT_CURSOR_X_ORIGIN
entities.description: 常量值，指示发送光栅数据块后光标的x位置。可以是以下项之一：NO_MOVE

entities.name: AT_RECT_X_ORIGIN
entities.description: Specifies the x-coordinate where the cursor should be positioned after filling a rectangular area in printer operations. Can also be AT_RECT_X_END.

entities.name: AT_RECT_Y_ORIGIN
entities.description: Specifies the y-coordinate origin for printer rectangle fill operations. Used as a parameter in CmdRectGrayFill command.

entities.name: PRINTER_PROPERTY
entities.description: Specifies printer property type. If PRINTER_PROPERTY is set, the feature's option values are saved in the registry. For DOC_PROPERTY or JOB_PROPERTY, option values are saved with the document.

entities.name: DBL_JAPANESE_POSTCARD_ROTATED
entities.description: Japanese postcard rotated double size constant for printer settings

entities.name: FANFOLD_STD_GERMAN
entities.description: German standard fanfold paper size

entities.name: RC_HTPATTERN
entities.description: 打印机驱动程序的半色调模式资源标识符。如果提供了 IPrintOemUni::HalftonePattern 方法，则需要此项。可以是 1 或 3，其中 3 表示红色、绿色和蓝色的单独模式，按此顺序排列。如果未指定，则默认值为 1。可与 *rcHTPatternID 或 *HTCallbackID 一起使用。如果指定了 *rcHTPatternID，则为必填项。最大模式大小为 PAIR (256, 256)。宽度和高度相乘后，必须能被 4 整除，才能作为 DWORD 存储。

entities.name: RC_UFM
entities.description: Resource identifier constant representing fonts applicable only to portrait orientation in printer cartridges. Must specify at least one of *Fonts, *PortraitFonts or *LandscapeFonts. Font resource identifiers should be numbered consecutively starting from 1.

entities.name: LANDSCAPE_CC90
entities.description: 打印机方向选项常量。在支持横向模式和纵向模式的打印机GPD文件中指定此选项时，Unidrv会向打印机发出横向命令字符串，使其从纵向模式坐标系切换到横向模式坐标系（原点位于左下角）。

entities.name: PERSONALITY_HPGL2
entities.description: 打印机驱动程序配置常量，定义在stdnames.gpd文件中。用于设置HPGL2图形模式个性参数。

entities.name: PERSONALITY_PCLXL
entities.description: Defined in stdnames.gpd. WDK includes a sample GPD file p6sample.gpd to help developers create new PCL XL minidrivers. PCL XL command sequencing is more critical than PCL-5.

entities.name: FORM_INFO_2
entities.description: Contains form information including display name referenced by pDisplayName and corresponding language ID in wLangID. Printer drivers using FORM_INFO_1 structure when calling AddForm will only store information found in that structure. When queried via GetForm or EnumForms returning FORM_INFO_2, members not found in FORM_INFO_1 will be NULL or 0.

entities.name: ENCAPSULATED_POSTSCRIPT
entities.description: 将封装的PostScript(EPS)数据发送到打印机的转义码。此转义符与驱动程序的DrvDrawEscape函数相关联。

entities.name: POSTSCRIPT_PASSTHROUGH
entities.description: 指示 EPS 打印的开始或结束。图形设备接口 (GDI) 会截获此转义符，并将其转换为 DrvEscape 以外的 DDI 调用。打印机驱动程序未收到此转义符。

entities.name: ROP_LEVEL_1
entities.description: ROP level 1 raster operation support

entities.name: AddPrinterConnection
entities.description: Adds a connection to a specified printer

entities.name: COPYFILE_FLAG_SERVER_SPOOLER
entities.description: Flag indicating the copy operation is performed by the server spooler

entities.name: COPYFILE_FLAG_CLIENT_SPOOLER
entities.description: Flag used in printer spooler operations to indicate client-side copying behavior

entities.name: SPLDS_DRIVER_KEY
entities.description: 用于存储驱动程序特定的信息，这些信息可由后台处理程序或驱动程序提供。后台处理程序使用SPLDS_DRIVER_KEY来存储可通过调用DeviceCapabilities函数获取的驱动程序功能。驱动程序负责存储后台处理程序无法获取的驱动程序功能。存储在这些键下的值必须由winspool.h中定义的SPLDS_前缀常量标识。

entities.name: PRINTER_INFO_7
entities.description: PRINTER_INFO_7 结构体用于调用 GetPrinter 函数，返回打印队列的发布状态和对象标识符。它支持打印机目录服务的打印机驱动程序，允许发布打印队列属性以便用户搜索特定属性的打印机。驱动程序可以通过 SetPrinterDataEx 和 SetPrinter 函数修改打印队列对象的属性信息。

entities.name: XSD_INT
entities.description: Defines the native XSD type int, ensuring correct implementation of parser filter intentions. Used in GDL templates for data type conversion between hexadecimal and decimal formats.

entities.name: MOST_TO_LEAST_RECENT
entities.description: 所有定义按从高到低的顺序显示

entities.name: PRINTER_EVENT_CONFIGURATION_UPDATE
entities.description: 向驱动程序发送通知，用于通知驱动程序设备的配置已更改。驱动程序可以确定设备配置何时发生更改，因为通知消息携带更改的值。

entities.name: Installed
entities.description: 适用于设备的Web服务(WSD) Installed构造，用于指示是否已安装与给定条件集匹配的打印机功能。如果XPath筛选器在应用于给定条件时获得有效的XML结果，则返回TRUE。该构造在WsdBidi.xsd中定义。

entities.name: TrayName
entities.description: 输出托盘的 IHV 映射属性名称。IHV 可以使用以下列表中的名称映射输出箱的特定于 IHV 的托盘名称。

entities.name: ERROR_BIDI_DEVICE_OFFLINE
entities.description: The bidirectional printer device is offline.

entities.name: ERROR_BIDI_SCHEMA_NOT_SUPPORTED
entities.description: The bidirectional schema is not supported by the printer driver.

entities.name: ERROR_BIDI_SERVER_OFFLINE
entities.description: The bidirectional communication server is offline.

entities.name: ERROR_BIDI_STATUS_WARNING
entities.description: ERROR_NO_DATA 说明 支持 bidi 调用，但与远程打印机的连接不可用。 bidi 调用已成功完成，但单个响应中存在一个或多个错误。 端口监视器或打印提供程序不支持 bidi 调用。 调用方尝试访问端口监视器或打印提供程序不支持的 bidi 架构 调用方尝试设置只读属性。 支持 bidi 调用，但无法连接到远程打印机服务器。 bidi 调用已成功完成。 bidi 调用已成功完成，但单个响应中存在一个或多个错误。 双向架构未知。 双向接口和枚举项目• 2023/06/15 本部分提供有关使 V4 打印驱动程序能够与 USB 打印设备双向通信的接口和枚举的信息。 下面是本节中的主题列表： 打印机双向接口打印机双向枚举 打印机双向接口项目• 2023/06/15 这些接口使 V4 打印驱动程序模型能够建立和维护与 USB 打印机的 Bidi 通信。 只能通过在打印后台处理程序中运行的 JavaScript 代码访问这些接口。 有关后台处理程序的详细信息，请参阅 打印后台处理程序体系结构 和 打印后台处理程序组件。 下面是 Bidi 接口的列表。 IPrinterBidiSchemaElement IPrinterBidiSchemaResponses IPrinterBidiSchemaElement 接口项目• 2025/03/27 IPrinterBidiSchemaElement 接口作为参数传递给 USB 扩展 JavaScript 方法

return_value.description: 此方法返回 HRESULT 值。 此方法返回 HRESULT 值。 此方法返回 HRESULT 值。

entities.name: TVOT_3STATES
entities.description: TVOT_3STATES option type consists of three radio buttons in a group box. Used in OPTITEM structure where Sel/pSel points to the index of OPTPARAM array in OPTTYPE structure's pOptParam member. Each OPTPARAM array element contains: pData for button label text strings (state 1-3), IconID for associated icons (state 1-3), and unused lParam.

entities.name: TVOT_EDITBOX
entities.description: TVOT_EDITBOX option type consists of an edit box within a group box. The OPTITEM structure's Sel/pSel member is an application-provided pointer to a NULL-terminated string containing the current contents of the edit box. The OPTPARAM structure array (OPTTYPE's pOptParam member): pOptParam[0]->pData points to a NULL-terminated text string to display to the right of the edit box. pOptParam[1]->pData points to a NULL-terminated text string to display above the edit box. pOptParam[0]->IconID identifies an icon to associate with the edit box. pOptParam[1]->IconID specifies the size (in bytes) of the edit box and buffer pointed to by pSel in the OPTITEM structure.

entities.name: PUSHBUTTON_TYPE_CALLBACK
entities.description: Specifies the action performed by CPSUI when a user clicks a button. Possible values include: CPSUI calls the application's _CPSUICALLBACK-type callback function to handle the button event (with CPSUICBPARAM's Reason member set to CPSUICB_REASON_PUSHBUTTON), application's dialog procedure handles the button event (see DLGPAGE remarks), CPSUI displays halftone color adjustment dialog, or CPSUI displays device halftone setup dialog.

entities.name: TVOT_SCROLLBAR
entities.description: TVOT_SCROLLBAR选项类型由组框内的滚动条组成。OPTITEM结构Sel/pSel表示当前滚动条位置的值。OPTPARAM结构数组（OPTTYPE的pOptParam成员）pData pOptParam[0]->pData指向标识滚动条单元的以NULL结尾的文本字符串。pOptParam[1]->pData指向一个以NULL结尾的文本字符串，描述滚动条范围的低端。pOptParam[2]->pData指向一个以NULL结尾的文本字符串，描述滚动条范围的高端。IconID pOptParam[0]->IconID标识要与滚动条关联的图标。pOptParam[1]->IconID指定一个16位带符号值，表示滚动条范围的低端。pOptParam[2]->IconID指定在显示选定滚动位置的值之前应用于该位置的乘法因子。（通常，该值为1。）lParam pOptParam[0]->lParam不使用。pOptParam[1]->lParam指定一个16位带符号值，表示滚动条范围的高端。pOptParam[2]->lParam指定滚动增量值。

entities.name: TVOT_TRACKBAR
entities.description: TVOT_TRACKBAR 选项类型由组框内的跟踪条组成。 OPTITEM 结构 Sel/pSel 表示当前跟踪条位置的值。 OPTPARAM 结构数组（OPTTYPE 的 pOptParam 成员） pData pOptParam[0]->pData 指向标识跟踪条单元的以 NULL 结尾的文本字符串。 pOptParam[1]->pData 指向一个以 NULL 结尾的文本字符串，描述跟踪条范围的低端。 pOptParam[2]->pData 指向一个以 NULL 结尾的文本字符串，描述跟踪条范围的高端。 IconID pOptParam[0]->IconID 标识要与跟踪条关联的图标。 pOptParam[1]->IconID 指定一个 16 位带符号值，表示跟踪条范围的低端。 pOptParam[2]->IconID 指定在显示选定跟踪位置的值之前应用于该位置的乘法因子。（通常，该值为 1。） lParam pOptParam[0]->lParam 不使用。 pOptParam[1]->lParam 指定一个 16 位带符号值，表示跟踪条范围的高端。 pOptParam[2]->lParam 指定跟踪增量值。

entities.name: ASN_RFC1155_COUNTER
entities.description: SNMP OID counter data type from RFC1155 specification

entities.name: XPS_FP_PROGRESS_REPORT
entities.description: Represents progress report for XPS fixed page printing

entities.name: IOCTL_PAR_QUERY_DEVICE_ID
entities.description: IOCTL code for querying device ID on parallel port devices. Used when migrating between USB and parallel printers.

entities.name: ClosePrinter
entities.description: Closes the specified printer handle

entities.name: GetPrinter
entities.description: Retrieves information about a specified printer.

entities.name: SetPrinter
entities.description: Sets the printer configuration for a specified printer.

entities.name: PRINTER_NOTIFY_OPTIONS_REFRESH
entities.description: Flags for calling FindNextPrinterChangeNotification, invoked by the router. Modifies data types or DEVMODEW structure for print queues. Obsolete. Printer driver management functionality.

entities.name: StartDocPrinter
entities.description: Initiates a print job on the specified printer. Returns a job identifier and spool file path. The caller uses CreateFile and WriteFile to send data to the spooler file. The AddJob...ScheduleJob sequence is an alternative to the StartDocPrinter...EndDocPrinter sequence for print job scheduling.

entities.name: AddPortEx
entities.description: Adds a printer port to the list of available ports with extended options

entities.name: RegisterForPrintAsyncNotifications
entities.description: Registers for print asynchronous notifications. Parameters: 1. LPCWSTR - local/remote printer or server name. 2. PrintAsyncNotificationType* - notification types the listener is interested in. 3. PrintAsyncNotifyUserFilter - user filter indicating which users' notifications to receive. 4. PrintAsyncNotifyConversationStyle - conversation style filter (unidirectional or bidirectional). 5. IPrintAsyncNotifyCallback* - callback interface for notifications (cannot be NULL). Returns: HANDLE* - registration handle (opaque structure) that must be used with UnRegisterForPrintAsyncNotifications to stop receiving notifications. The registration is associated with the calling thread's user identity. For unidirectional communication, any pending notifications on server side will be eliminated. For bidirectional communication, it continues until the channel is closed.

entities.name: UnRegisterForPrintAsyncNotifications
entities.description: Unregisters for print asynchronous notifications. The HANDLE parameter specifies the registration handle to unregister.

entities.name: CHANNEL_CLOSED_BY_ANOTHER_LISTENER
entities.description: CHANNEL_CLOSED_BY_SAME_LISTENER

entities.name: CHANNEL_NOT_OPENED
entities.description: CreateNotificationChannel 将送向 返回此值。方和 单 向 已在此频道上发出呼叫。 不允发双 0x0c

entities.name: MAX_NOTIFICATION_SIZE_EXCEEDED
entities.description: 当通知队列已满时，SendNotification将返回此错误码(0x13)

entities.name: MAX_REGISTRATION_COUNT_EXCEEDED
entities.description: Returned by RegisterForNotifications when the channel count exceeds the maximum allowed number (0x16)

entities.name: FORM_INFO_1
entities.description: typedef struct _FORM_INFO_1 { DWORD Flags; LPTSTR pName; SIZEL Size; RECTL ImageableArea; } FORM_INFO_1, *PFORM_INFO_1; pName成员是唯一的字符串字段，可用于创建内部搜索例程查找表单键名称或作为显示名称。FORM_INFO_2结构添加了额外字段以提供MUI支持。

entities.name: LPPRINTER_INFO_2
entities.description: pInfo = NULL; DWORD cbNeeded; TCHAR gszPrintProc[] = TEXT("<Print processor name>"); TCHAR gszPrintDriver[] = TEXT("<Printer driver name>"); BOOL bRet = TRUE; if ((Level == 2) && (pDUI2 = (PDRIVER_UPGRADE_INFO_2)pDriverUpgradeInfo) && (OpenPrinter(pDUI2->pPrinterName, &hPrinter, &PrinterDef))) { if ( !GetPrinter( hPrinter, 2, (LPBYTE) pInfo, 0, &cbNeeded ) && (GetLastError() != ERROR_INSUFFICIENT_BUFFER) ) { bRet = FALSE; } if (bRet == TRUE) { pInfo = (LPPRINTER_INFO_2) LocalAlloc(LPTR, cbNeeded); bRet = pInfo ? TRUE : FALSE; } if (bRet == TRUE) { if (GetPrinter(hPrinter, 2, (LPBYTE) pInfo, cbNeeded, &cbNeeded)) { // // This function is called for every printer queue that uses a driver // for which one or more files were updated. However, we only want to // update the printer queue's "driver" by a particular driver. // if ( !lstrcmpi(pInfo->pDriverName, gszPrintDriver) ) { pInfo->pPrintProcessor = gszPrintProc;

entities.name: DELETE_PORT_DATA_1
entities.description: Deletes port data structure. Requires DELETE_PORT_DATA_1 structure address as parameter. Returns NO_ERROR on success or ERROR_ACCESS_DENIED if caller lacks sufficient permissions.
